summary: See clues file for full details. 14 tossups, 19 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 14 tossups and 19 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: A set of 103 postcard-sized drawings by this artist, rediscovered in 2019, was commissioned for a never-published encyclopedia called The Great Picture Book of Everything.
examples: A set of 103 postcard-sized drawings by this artist, rediscovered in 2019, was commissioned for a never-published encyclopedia called The Great Picture Book of Everything.

clues.clue: This artist used eight diagonal gray bands to represent a stream in which two mallards search for food.
examples: This artist used eight diagonal gray bands to represent a stream in which two mallards search for food.

clues.clue: Late in life, this artist engaged in "daily exorcisms" involving painting a lion every day, and painted other big cats in late works like Tiger in the Snow.
examples: Late in life, this artist engaged in "daily exorcisms" involving painting a lion every day, and painted other big cats in late works like Tiger in the Snow.

clues.clue: This artist predicted that his art would finally achieve a divine state at age 110 in the colophon to a series of books in which he called himself an "old man mad about painting." That series includes over 100 depictions of a site that this artist also depicted in prints like Fine Wind, Clear Morning and Thunderstorm Beneath the Summit.
examples: This artist predicted that his art would finally achieve a divine state at age 110 in the colophon to a series of books in which he called himself an "old man mad about painting." That series includes over 100 depictions of a site that this artist also depicted in prints like Fine Wind, Clear Morning and Thunderstorm Beneath the Summit.

clues.clue: A work by this artist depicts a maid whose neck is made of plates rising like a snake out of a well.
examples: A work by this artist depicts a maid whose neck is made of plates rising like a snake out of a well.

clues.clue: This artist depicted people grabbing at loose papers while on a winding path through a field.
examples: This artist depicted people grabbing at loose papers while on a winding path through a field.

clues.clue: To recreate the image of maple leaves in a river, this artist dipped a chicken's feet in ink and ran it across a canvas.
examples: To recreate the image of maple leaves in a river, this artist dipped a chicken's feet in ink and ran it across a canvas.

clues.clue: A landmark that this artist once depicted through a craftsman's barrel is rendered in bright orange in Fine Wind, Clear Morning.
examples: A landmark that this artist once depicted through a craftsman's barrel is rendered in bright orange in Fine Wind, Clear Morning.

clues.clue: This artist used Prussian Blue for a ukiyo-e  artwork that depicts a cresting phenomenon over two boats of fishermen.
examples: This artist used Prussian Blue for a ukiyo-e  artwork that depicts a cresting phenomenon over two boats of fishermen.

clues.clue: An artist from this country showed a general in a red dress standing on his boat and staring towards a gray mountain in one entry in a 100-painting series whose entries all depict the moon.
examples: An artist from this country showed a general in a red dress standing on his boat and staring towards a gray mountain in one entry in a 100-painting series whose entries all depict the moon.

clues.clue: A witch unfurls a scroll at the left side of a triptych from this country that depicts two warriors preparing to battle a gigantic skeleton.
examples: A witch unfurls a scroll at the left side of a triptych from this country that depicts two warriors preparing to battle a gigantic skeleton.

clues.clue: In another triptych, that artist from this country showed cats in various states of being awake and sleeping.
examples: In another triptych, that artist from this country showed cats in various states of being awake and sleeping.
